channel.title: Red Hat OpenShift Virtualization on Validated Patterns
channel.description: Recent content in Red Hat OpenShift Virtualization on Validated Patterns

item.title: Portworx DR
item.description: This pattern demonstrates the use of Red Hat Ansible Automation Platform to configure and execute Portworx Enterprise Disaster Recovery.

item.title: NetApp DR Starter Kit
item.description: This pattern provides a starter kit for implementing disaster recovery (DR) using NetApp solutions. It includes best practices, reference architectures, and deployment guides to help organizations quickly set up and manage their DR environments with NetApp technologies.

item.title: RamenDR Starter Kit
item.description: This pattern demonstrates the use of Red Hat OpenShift Data Foundations for Virtualization Regional Disaster Recovery

item.title: Virtualization Starter Kit
item.description: This pattern uses OpenShift Virtualization to host VMs.

item.title: Federated Edge Observability
item.description: This pattern uses OpenShift Virtualization to simulate an edge environment for VMs which then report metrics via OpenTelemetry.

item.title: OpenShift Virtualization Data Protection with Veeam Kasten
item.description: This pattern uses OpenShift Virtualization to simulate an edge environment for VMs, protected by Veeam Kasten.

item.title: Ansible Edge GitOps
item.description: This pattern uses OpenShift Virtualization to simulate an edge environment for VMs.
